use proptest::prelude::*;

fn parse_query(input: &str) -> Result<Query, ParseError> {
    // parser implementation
    todo!()
}

proptest! {
    // BAD: no regression case for a parser that previously crashed on specific input
    #[test]
    fn test_parse_never_panics(input in ".*") {
        let _ = std::panic::catch_unwind(|| {
            let _ = parse_query(&input);
        });
    }
}

// No regression test file like: tests/regressions/query_parser_crash.txt
// No seed capture for minimized failures
